name_cn:
Chane1 Cardholder card holder🜲
Classic Caviar skin Caviar Black Gold
Counter price 3000rmb purchased for development➠
I highly recommend this classic card holder☑It is indeed very practical
Hard to find at the counter💕It has always been difficult to buy
Especially the durable Caviar cowhide,
This time the leather is from the cutting department ZP channel
Friends can buy with confidence🪄
Card capacity is very nice〰️
Leather: Exclusive channel ZP Caviar
Hardware: Full steel gold buckle
Size: 7.5*11.2*0.5cm
Model: A31510
